hero_prompt_inject: A 900ml square meal prep tray with soft rounded corners, a warm beige matte base and a clear rigid plastic lid, photographed from directly above on a clean light grey surface. A bold red wraparound label band reading '/delicut/' in white spans the full width of the lid, with a white nutritional info panel at its center. Inside the tray, a colorful Mediterranean chickpeas salad with shrimp, zucchini, and couscous is visible through the transparent lid.

items.visual_description: Two rectangular food product labels of different sizes. Label 1 is a landscape-oriented square label with a clean grid layout featuring the brand logo, product name, nutritional info, barcode, and metadata. Label 2 is a taller portrait-oriented label with the same information but rotated 90 degrees to fit a narrower vertical format, with the barcode running vertically along the left edge.
items.colors: Both labels use a light grey/cream background (#F9F4ED toned), black typography, and a white base. No bold brand colors like Grenade red or Pumpkin orange are used directly on the labels — the design is minimal monochromatic with black and off-white only.
items.material: Paper-based adhesive label stock, likely matte finish self-adhesive labels suitable for food packaging
items.branding_position: The /delicut/ wordmark logo appears prominently in the top-left area of both labels in large bold sans-serif type. On Label 1 it sits top-left with 'delicut.ae' to its right. On Label 2 it appears at the top center of the label.
items.label_style: Clean, modern, typographic-forward design using a bold grotesque sans-serif font. Label carries: brand logo, product name, category (e.g. Snacks), meal size, macronutrient breakdown (kcal, pro, carbs, fat), best before date, made-for customer name and ID, barcode, and website URL. Layout uses a structured grid with clear hierarchy — large numbers for macros, smaller text for metadata.
items.usage_instructions: No explicit application instructions are shown on the page. Labels appear to be peel-and-stick adhesive labels applied directly to meal containers or packaging.
items.dimensions_noted: Label 1: 60mm wide x 60mm tall. Label 2: 45mm wide x 65mm tall.
items.prompt_inject: Two minimalist food product labels from the brand /delicut/ printed on matte cream-white adhesive paper, featuring bold black sans-serif typography with macronutrient data and a barcode. One label is square at 60x60mm, the other taller at 45x65mm with rotated vertical text layout. Both labels sit flat on a clean white surface, evoking a premium healthy meal prep brand.

items.visual_description: The stickers and tapes section shows several packaging elements: two standard tape strips with rounded rectangular label areas (white background with a horizontal brand stripe), two bag tape strips in a wide rectangular format featuring bold branding with a QR code on the right side, and two circular stickers 40mm in diameter — one in red and one in dark green — both featuring the /delicut/ wordmark centered.
items.colors: Dominant colors are Grenade red (#FF3F1F) and Spinach green (#043F12). The standard tape uses both colors as horizontal stripe bands on a white/cream background. The bag tapes alternate — one red background, one green background. The circular stickers mirror this — one solid red, one solid green. White text is used for the logo on all colored surfaces.
items.material: Adhesive sticker and tape material — likely self-adhesive vinyl or paper-based label stock for stickers, and printed adhesive tape for the standard and bag tape variants.
items.branding_position: On standard tape: branding appears as a horizontal stripe across the center of the label. On bag tape: '/delicut/' logo and 'gourmet everyday' tagline are on the left-center, QR code on the far right. On circular stickers: '/delicut/' wordmark is centered within the circle.
items.label_style: Bold sans-serif font for the '/delicut/' wordmark with forward slashes as part of the logo identity. Bag tape includes secondary text 'gourmet everyday' in smaller weight next to the logo. Standard tape also includes 'delicut.ae' URL. Layout is clean and minimal with high contrast white-on-color typography. QR code featured on bag tapes for digital linking.
items.usage_instructions: No explicit application instructions are shown. The standard tape appears designed for sealing packaging boxes or bags, while the bag tape is sized specifically for sealing food bags. Stickers are likely used for branding individual items or closures.
items.dimensions_noted: Standard tape height: 20mm. Bag tape dimensions: 222mm wide x 45mm tall. Circular stickers: 40mm diameter (both red and green variants).
items.prompt_inject: A pair of bold circular stickers, one vivid red and one deep forest green, each 40mm wide, printed with the white '/delicut/' logo centered in clean sans-serif type, lying flat on a light cream surface. Beside them, a wide rectangular bag tape strip in matching red and green showing the /delicut/ brand name in large white bold font with a QR code on the right. The stickers and tape have a crisp, modern feel with high-contrast branding typical of a premium healthy food delivery brand.

The body of the tray appears to be a light grey/silver-white color.

items.branding_position: The Delicut label is placed centrally on the top lid of the tray. A secondary dark green wraparound band runs around the perimeter of the tray sides, displaying the '/delicut/' logo and 'delicut.ae' URL in white text.

items.dimensions_noted: A measurement of 62 mm is indicated at the top of the image, likely referring to the label width or the tray lid dimension.
